name: Zero Risk — Meta Ads Full-Stack Optimizer v2 (Daily 3am)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "agent": "media-buyer",
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "task": "Meta Ads advanced optimization for campaign {{ $json.campaign_name }} ({{ $json.spend_efficiency_tier }} tier). Tier-specific targets: beta=1.5x, scaling=2.5x, efficient=4x, mature=5x. Flagged ads ({{ $json.flagged.length }}): {{ JSON.stringify($json.flagged.slice(0,3)) }}. Root causes detected: {{ JSON.stringify($json.flagged.map(a => a.root_cause).filter((v,i,a) => a.indexOf(v) === i)) }}. Winners ({{ $json.winners.length }}): {{ JSON.stringify($json.winners.slice(0,2)) }}. Anomalies ({{ $json.anomalies.length }}): {{ JSON.stringify($json.anomalies.slice(0,2)) }}. Produce: (1) 10-point anomaly diagnosis checklist (creative_fatigue, audience_saturation, bidding_immaturity, messaging_mismatch, competitive_displacement, seasonality, etc.), (2) optimization hierarchy (audience→creative→landing→offer→bid), (3) spend tier-specific action plan, (4) 5 creative concept hooks ready for brief, (5) A/B test matrix (2x2 bandit or multivariate), (6) incremental spend recommendation, (7) diminishing returns curve with saturation week estimate. Return as structured JSON.",
  "client_id": "{{ $json.client_id }}",
  "extra": {{ JSON.stringify($json) }},
  "workflow_id": "{{ $workflow.id }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}"
}

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] Load active clients with apify enabled (meta_ads_optimizer)

main.node: [APIFY-WIRE] Load active clients with apify enabled (meta_ads_optimizer)
